name: Make- Ahead French Toast
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9 x 13-inch shallow baking dish and set aside.
2. In a large bowl, beat together all ingredients except the bread.
3. Arrange the bread slices so they overlap.
4. Pour the egg mixture over the bread.
5. Cover; refrigerate overnight.
6. When ready to serve, preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
7. Bake for 30 to 35 minutes, until golden and fluffy.
8. Serve with hot syrup or jam. Makes 8 servings.
